entities.context: Bersatu president; NEW director flag — 'bentuk gabungan baharu lebih hebat selepas PRN Negeri Sembilan' hint at PN exit. Corroborated across Sinar Harian, MalaysiaGazette, Buletin TV3, Harian Metro, Utusan. Also: Bersatu bertanding 24 kerusi guna logo sendiri; utamakan kebajikan rakyat jika diberi mandat.

Contesting 24 of 36 DUN under own logo (broke from PN). Advised by analyst Lau Zhe Wei to quit PN dragging Gerakan+MIPP. Internal crisis (pecat/quorum). Hard-news 'Bersatu exit imminent' narrative corroborated across 6+ outlets.

Chairs PN; ended political cooperation with Bersatu last month but both remain in PN. Hadi Awang calls for Malay-Muslim unity incl MCA/MIC; PAS not masuk campur Bersatu logo decision; PAS sedia lawan Bersatu if bertembung.
Electoral pact with BN for NS (PN 11 seats, BN 25, no overlap). PN lulus rundingan agihan kerusi, guna logo gabungan. Wawasan (4 seats), Gerakan (1), MIPP (1) contest under PN banner.

Kiandee called on PN-MT to convene immediately to assess Bersatu's position within coalition amid quorum crisis. 'Interests of PN must take precedence over any individual.' No formal PN-MT expulsion notice / Bersatu withdrawal issued this cycle.
49-member MPT; Kiandee claims 27 resigned/sacked/suspended → quorum (Clause 13.12) unmet → RoS intervention risk. Radzi Jidin rebutted: quorum 12/23 sufficient, 'jalan seperti biasa'.

NEW director flag — Kiandee quorum question entity. Suspended Bersatu VP; cited Clause 13.12, 27/49 MPT gone, warned RoS intervention, tied crisis to NS PRN, called PN-MT to convene. Escalation originated 11 Jul; Radzi rebutted same day; no NEW escalation 14:46-17:39 MYT 19 Jul.
Bersatu VP; formal quorum rebuttal — 'jalan seperti biasa', MPT cukup kuorum (12/23 sufficient), letak jawatan ahli tak jejas mesyuarat. Rebuttal to Kiandee.

[CRITICAL — pecat/keluar flag] Sacked from Bersatu Feb 2026 at height of leadership tussle with Muhyiddin. Wawasan (his vehicle) + Pejuang admitted into PN (FMT 22 Jun). 'Ceraikan Bersatu hanya alasan keluar PN untuk bersama Hamzah dan Reset' framing.
[CRITICAL — pecat flag] Among 5 Bersatu leaders sacked (Oct 2025). Also: 'PRN N9: Bersatu dianggap kacau daun, Wan Saiful bimbang pertembungan kerusi Melayu' (Harian Metro 19 Jul).
Bersatu leader; subject of 'Dr Sam pecat Radzi, Azmin berdasarkan perlembagaan' PAS-leader claim. Also 'Bersatu akan buat post-mortem untuk perkukuh perjuangan parti - Azmin Ali' (Newswav).
PAS leader cited as claiming Radzi & Azmin pecat berdasarkan perlembagaan. Counter-narrative to Bersatu pecat wave.
'Impossible for PN to fulfil Bersatu's Negeri Sembilan demands, says Annuar' (FMT 16 Jul). Signals friction in Bersatu-PN seat negotiation.
Appointed to PN Supreme Council, says Bersatu (Malaysian Reserve, 15 May 2026). Bersatu's PN-MT representation.
'Bersatu should leave PN, says Selangor PAS Youth' (FMT 11 Jun). Amplifier of Bersatu-exit narrative from PAS side.
[PRIORITY — viral amplifier] IIUM analyst; advises Bersatu to quit PN dragging Gerakan+MIPP so PN reduced to Malay/conservative coalition. Drives 'Bersatu exit imminent' hard-news corroboration.
[PRIORITY — viral amplifier] USM analyst; 'Bersatu heading for another wipeout', 'in no position to win seats going solo'. Amplifies Bersatu-exit + disarray narrative.
USM analyst; 'all that people see coming out of Bersatu is the infighting'; Bersatu hasn't distinguished itself from Umno/PAS. Amplifies 'Bersatu in disarray'.
Gerakan (led by Dominic Lau) contesting 1 seat under PN banner; advised to leave PN with Bersatu to strip PN of multiethnic image.
Contesting 1 seat under PN banner; advised to follow Bersatu out of PN.
[CRITICAL — pecat/keluar flag] Gerakan pecat keahlian Tang Jay Son after he tanding atas tiket Bersatu in NS (Astro Awani 18 Jul). Cross-coalition defection indicator.
'Korum mesyuarat MPT Bersatu tidak perlu dijadikan isu' (Newswav 13 Jul). Quorum-deescalation voice.

[CRITICAL flag per director] Dominant PIR-06 narrative. Kiandee: 27/49 gone, Clause 13.12, RoS risk, PN stability. Rebuttal: Radzi (cukup), Marzuki (tak perlu jadi isu). Multiple outlets (FMT EN/BM, Sinar, Newswav, aliran).

entities.entity: Bersatu exit imminent (bentuk gabungan baharu post-NS)
entities.context: [CRITICAL — hard-news corroboration] Muhyiddin's 'gabungan baharu lebih hebat selepas PRN NS' hint + analyst 'Quit PN' advice. Corroborated by Sinar Harian, Buletin TV3, MalaysiaGazette, Harian Metro, FMT, Utusan Malaysia.
[CRITICAL flag] Hamzah (Feb 2026), 5 leaders incl Wan Saiful (Oct 2025), lagi pemimpin letak jawatan keluar parti (Newswav 13 Jul), Tang Jay Son (Gerakan pecat). Tied to Hamzah-Muhyiddin tussle.
PAS ended cooperation with Bersatu last month (both remain in PN); PAS abandoned Bersatu during Johor campaign; Hadi told voters to back BN in non-PN seats. 'Toxic PN' framing.

PAS president; calls for Malay-Muslim unity with 'non-extreme' partners incl MCA, MIC, DHPP; reject 'unnatural Malay groups with DAP'. Also 'Bukan retorik, Hadi beri isyarat uji model kerjasama PN-BN menjelang PRU16'. Signals PN-BN model for PRU16.

DAP sec-gen, NS DAP chief, Transport Minister, Chennah incumbent. 'MCA biggest loser' quote + 'tekad buktikan pengkritik silap, ikrar pikat undi Melayu'. Sarcastic 'terima kasih MCA/Wee Ka Siong begitu murah hati'. Faces MCA's Siow Kong Choon 1-on-1 in Chennah.

[PIR-16 NEW — MCA rebuttal entity] MCA president; rebuttal to Loke — 'kerjasama BN-PN bukan satu gabungan, elak pecah undi', MCA akan menentang dasar yang menjejaskan hak majmuk. Earlier quipped MCA 'membantu DAP' by giving 3 seats to PN. Drives MCA-rebuttal narrative.
'Biggest loser' (per Loke) — gave up 3 traditional seats (Lobak, Mambau, Lukut) to PN. Contesting 7 seats; only Chennah is 1-on-1 vs DAP (Loke). Grassroots 'stay or leave' pressure on BN future.

[PIR-16 NEW — MCA rebuttal entity] NOT surfaced this cycle. Only stale index.md mention; no fresh Mah Hang Soon response to Loke 'biggest loser' quote found in 19 Jul scrapes. GAP — to watch for in next cycle.
Loke's dominant PIR-16 narrative: MCA sacrificed 3 traditional Chinese-majority seats (Lobak, Mambau, Lukut) to PN's DHPP/Wawasan/MIPP. Corroborated FMT, mkini, Awani.
NOT directly surfaced this cycle. 'Barking dogs' / 'DAP coalition-intolerant' phrasings not found in 19 Jul full-text scrapes (Albert Tei also absent). Watch next cycle.
NOT surfaced this cycle. No Albert Tei entity found in 19 Jul scrapes. GAP.

Underlying BN-PN cooperation rationale: avoid perpecahan undi Melayu. Hadi: Malay-Muslim unity; Tok Mat: safeguard future of race and religion; Loke counter: will prove DAP can win Malay votes in Chennah.
Bersatu menyasarkan membentuk kerajaan NS, calon di 24/36 DUN, 'melebihi jumlah majoriti mudah' (Facebook 19 Jul). Bersatu's optimistic counter-narrative to wipeout predictions.

Jalaluddin: PN agreed MB post for BN if pact wins; no MB candidate or exco allocation discussed yet. Contenders floated: Jalaluddin, Mohamad Hasan, Sufian Maradzi. 'Win first, then discuss positions.'

Anwar directive: ministers/deputy ministers/agency heads must resign if they use federal positions to attack unity-government partners during state campaigns. Applies to Felda, Mara, Risda. Preserve federal working relations.
PM; 'resign if you want to attack unity partners' directive (NST 19 Jul). Discussed with DPMs Zahid & Fadillah. Federal-state competition boundary discipline.

BN chairman; NS BN-PN 'tactical move' to regain NS. 'Prestasi BN-PN di NS jadi penentu jajaran baharu PRN Melaka & PRU16' — links NS to Melaka fracture/realignment narrative. Also DPM in Anwar unity-govt discipline discussion.
Zahid: NS BN-PN performance will determine jajaran for PRN Melaka and PRU16. Dynamism of national landscape; Johor (8% GDP growth under BN) cited as proof. NS as realignment testbed.

FMT opinion (18 Jul): Umno 'validating the very force designed to replace it' by opening side door for PAS in NS. 'Friends with benefits' framing; existential concession; Amanat Hadi (1981) context. Counter-narrative to penyatuan undi Melayu.
PIR-16 listed entity. NOT directly surfaced as a standalone narrative in 19 Jul scrapes (referenced only as background context in Bersatu-exit coverage). Watch for trial-date triggers.
Not surfaced as a discrete entity this cycle. Anwar's directive (resign-to-attack) is the closest active Anwar narrative. 'Not briefed'/'postpone' phrasings absent from 19 Jul full-text.
Not surfaced this cycle. No 'sole opposition' framing found in 19 Jul scrapes.

[CRITICAL — director NEW flag] 'Bersatu exit imminent' corroborated by MULTIPLE hard-news outlets: Sinar Harian, Buletin TV3, MalaysiaGazette, Harian Metro, FMT (Quit PN advised), Utusan Malaysia, Astro Awani. Meets hard-news-corroboration CRITICAL threshold.

[PRIORITY — defector-framing] NS Umno chief, BN Pertang candidate. Rebutted 'derhaka/treachery' claim (withdrawing support for MB Aminuddin ≠ disloyalty to ruler/Undang). Booed by PH supporters at nomination. Declared PN agreed MB post for BN. PDM Klawang tutup protest.

[PRIORITY — 'fleeing Sikamat' defector-framing] Incumbent MB; MOVED from long-held Sikamat to Linggi (3-corner fight). 14 Umno assemblymen withdrew support in April over royal-dispute handling → state assembly dissolved. NST: 'Linggi move is risky for PH, says analyst'.

Umno deputy president, NS BN chairman, Rantau candidate (7th term). 'Act now or lose chance forever' — BN-PN understanding first mooted 2018, must not 'miss the boat' for race/religion future. Floated as MB contender.
Bersatu information chief; among 24 Bersatu candidates. Contesting Sikamat (3-corner), tumpu isu perbandaran lama. High-profile Bersatu face in NS.

[PRIORITY — defector-framing] 3-corner fight. Aminuddin vacated (moved to Linggi) → 'fleeing Sikamat' framing. PH: Nor Azman (per PIR-07 list); Bersatu: Tun Faisal Ismail Aziz. Aminuddin's former seat.
PH candidate at Sikamat (replacing Aminuddin who moved to Linggi). Per PIR-07 priority battleground list.
[PRIORITY] Aminuddin Harun (incumbent MB) moved here, 3-corner fight. NST analyst: 'Linggi move is risky for PH'. Director NEW flag: BN manifesto launch 24 Jul at DUN Linggi (not yet surfaced fresh).

entities.entity: BN manifesto launch 24 Jul at DUN Linggi
entities.context: [PIR-07 NEW flag] NOT yet surfaced fresh — only STALE 2023 scoop.my manifesto hit found in 19 Jul scrapes (Aminuddin, 04 Aug 2023). 24 Jul 2026 BN manifesto launch at Linggi NOT corroborated this cycle. GAP — high-priority watch for next scrape.
[PRIORITY] 3-corner fight (MalaysiaGazette 18 Jul). Per PIR-07 list: Nazri Kassim. Tier-4 priority seat.
Candidate at N.14 Ampangan (per PIR-07 priority battleground list). 3-corner fight confirmed.

[PRIORITY — 'not taking for granted'] 3-corner: Bakri Sawir (PH incumbent) vs Danni Rais (PN) — TWO COUSINS — vs Muhammad Adib Musa (Bersatu). 13,355 voters. PDM Klawang tutup protest (Umno not contesting). Day-1 dispatch: cousins met at Pasar Minggu Kuala Klawang, harmonious.
PH incumbent Klawang; cousin of PN rival Danni Rais. Day-1: berkempen secara sihat, turun bendera pasang di pagar stadium atas teguran MD Jelebu.
PN candidate Klawang; cousin of PH incumbent Bakri Sawir. 3-corner fight.
Bersatu candidate Klawang (3-corner). Bersatu solo-logo contender.
[PRIORITY] Bersatu incumbent Mohamad Hanifah Abu Baker confident defend, 3-corner saingan. Tier-4 priority seat.
Bersatu incumbent Labu; yakin mampu mempertahankan kerusi meskipun saingan tiga penjuru.
[PRIORITY] Leevineshwaraan (calon termuda, 23 yrs) uji nasib di DUN Sri Tanjung. Tier-4 priority seat.
Youngest candidate (23) in NS PRN; contesting Sri Tanjung. Day-1 dispatch human-interest entity.
[PRIORITY] 5-corner fight (lima penjuru) — RTM Portal. Most-contested seat. Tier-4 priority.
[PRIORITY] Tok Mat (Mohamad Hasan) seeking 7th term. BN-PN understanding origin story (2018). Day-1 dispatch.
Tier-4 priority seat (per PIR-07 list). Kuala Pilah cluster. Limited discrete coverage this cycle.
Tier-4 priority seat (per PIR-07 list). Limited discrete coverage this cycle.
Tier-4 priority seat (per PIR-07 list). Limited discrete coverage this cycle.
Seri Menanti BN candidate; floated by Jalaluddin as one of several qualified MB contenders (alongside Mohamad Hasan, Jalaluddin himself).

[PRIORITY — director flag] Aminuddin's move Sikamat→Linggi = 'fleeing Sikamat' framing; Jalaluddin's 'derhaka/treachery' rebuttal (withdrawing MB support ≠ disloyalty to ruler). PH supporters booed Jalaluddin at nomination. Core defector-framing narrative.

[PIR-07 NEW flag — afternoon Day-1 dispatch] Nomination 18 Jul (103 candidates, youngest 23 oldest 70), campaign Day-1 19 Jul: cousins Klawang at Pasar Minggu, Loke Chennah tinjau mesya, Tok Mat Rantau Family Day, Jalaluddin booed at Jelebu announcement.
DPM; in Anwar discipline discussion with Zahid re: federal-state campaign boundary.
Perak MB; present at Anwar's Madani Kita Programme (Ipoh) where unity-govt discipline directive issued.
MCA Youth chief NS; BN challenger to Loke in Chennah (only 1-on-1 DAP-MCA fight).
